title: Reporting Phishing or Suspicious Emails
text:
Q: How do I report a phishing or suspicious email?
A: If you receive a phishing or suspicious email, do not click on any links or download any attachments. Immediately forward the email to our IT security team at security@company.com. Include a brief description of why you find the email suspicious. After forwarding, delete the email from your inbox and your deleted items folder. Our IT team will investigate the issue and take necessary actions to protect our network. If you have any doubts or need further assistance, contact the IT helpdesk directly.
